ogTitle: Arndell Park vs Arrawarra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Arndell Park and Arrawarra.
heading: Arndell Park vs Arrawarra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Arndell Park, New South Wales and Arrawarra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Arndell Park has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Arrawarra (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Arndell Park or Arrawarra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Arndell Park has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Arrawarra scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Arndell Park scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Arrawarra scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Arndell Park or Arrawarra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Arndell Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
